summary:
WEATHER WARFARE AND EXTREME EVENTS: Brandon warns about unprecedented weather warfare inflicted by governments using advanced war machines and satellites, which he distinguishes from mere cloud seeding. He points to recent severe weather, including massive flooding in Mexico, extreme rains, and straight-line winds in Texas and Chicago, as evidence of governments losing control over their weather manipulation weapons. Brandon predicts the formation of the most dangerous hurricanes in history and urges constant intercession to mitigate these catastrophic weather anomalies.

GEOPOLITICAL SHIFTS AND PROPHETIC TIMELINES: Brandon highlights a significant spiritual timeframe surrounding the full moon on the 10th and a vision involving New York. He connects this to Benjamin Netanyahu's recent visit to the White House and ongoing negotiations for a peace accord with Arab nations, which he identifies as the biblical covenant of many and a foundation for building the Third Temple. Brandon warns that any decision to divide Jerusalem will result in the splitting of America along the New Madrid fault line and the decimation of the Mississippi River, while also noting potential geopolitical escalations involving Russia and Cuba.

SPIRITUAL HARVEST AND DELIVERANCE MINISTRIES: Brandon shares that the spiritual timeline known as Adam's lease is expiring, prompting Satan to attempt to accelerate the seven-year tribulation and the beast system. However, Brandon notes that God is granting a brief window for a massive global revival characterized by effortless, sweatless victories and abundant provision for believers. He predicts the rise of new leaders and powerful deliverance ministries that will cleanse the church of demonic oppression and hidden sin, preparing a glorious church without spot or wrinkle.

END TIMES SIGNS AND CELESTIAL ANOMALIES: Brandon points to the recent sacrifice of a red heifer as a definitive sign that preparations for the Third Temple and the rapture are accelerating. He issues stark warnings about increasing volcanic activity, specifically mentioning tremors at Mount Rainier, potential eruptions in British Columbia, Seattle, Oregon, Mount Fuji, and Italy. Brandon attributes these earthly disturbances to an incoming massive binary system confirmed by NASA, which he claims will pass between Earth and Mars on October 31st, causing planetary shifts and fearful sights in the heavens.

WEALTH TRANSFER AND RADICAL SURRENDER: Brandon foresees an impending massive wealth transfer, referencing Donald Trump's push for cryptocurrency ETFs that will create overnight decamillionaires and bless faithful believers. He emphasizes that navigating these turbulent times requires moving beyond rigid religious traditions and embracing spontaneous, genuine relationships with God. Brandon insists that breakthroughs will not come through repetitive religion alone but through radical praise and total surrender, likening the required worship to Paul and Silas in prison, which will trigger the final spiritual push needed to birth a worldwide awakening.
rawData: [July 11, 2025]-[What’s going on with the weather]-[https://youtu.be/-RS1-Cvy6lc]-[Hey, good morning family. Thank you for joining me today. Well, there's a lot of Weather Warfare Warning going on with all the weather that I've told you all was coming. Weather warfare. I'll just jump right into what I have for you, but I'm telling you all, I saw weapons of weather warfare. Now, people are saying this is seeding. Are they seeding and causing this? This was something that we've never seen before—governments inflicting warfare against the weather. Now, to what extent and how far it goes, I'm telling you all, we've never seen what's about to take place before. As we see Texas, as we see Mexico, as we see Chicago, we see all in the last week, ever since I gave this word, I mean, what is it, over eight days ago or whatever, when I warned you all about weather warfare and I said I saw weather warfare. I saw that, and trying to gain control and yield it as a weapon, they're going to lose control. And it's exactly what's happening. Mexico, the houses are floating down the road in just a matter of hours. Rains coming down in record numbers. It's to the point where it's almost like biblical stuff. You know, you go, 'What in the world is going on?' But it's happening all over the place. And this is exactly what I was trying to tell you all was coming in the vision. I said, 'I see a manipulation of the weather,' and I saw straight-line winds that will exceed anything we've ever seen before. You think this rain is something, and it's the floods and the rivers overflowing and 20 inches of rain in a couple of hours, 5 in, 6 in flooding the streets, and I saw wind gusts that will exceed anything we've ever seen before—hurricanes when they form that will be the strongest, most dangerous hurricanes in history. And the Lord said, 'You must intercede for the weather, for it will get out of control.' But I saw—I don't know how they're doing it, with satellites or with some kind of instrumentation that's causing this weather to do what. Now, people say this is seeding the weather. No, I saw something more sinister. It was something bigger than spraying a chemical in the atmosphere. This was something made by some kind of war machine. And I know that sounds sci-fi and that may sound really out there. But you're seeing fruit of what I've told you. You're seeing fruit of what I told you. I'm just not making this stuff up. I get this in prayer by the Spirit of God to warn you what's coming. And you're seeing fruit of it again by His grace. He's the one that's telling. I'm telling you all, it's amazing because even with the stuff I told you about with the genetically splicing human DNA and creating superhumans and all this, we haven't seen any of that in the news and I don't know if we ever will. I mean, that's pretty wild stuff. We probably will see—I know we'll see the woolly mammoth and the saber-tooth tiger and things like that in the days ahead because the Lord said we would. But when it comes to trying to create superhumans and those things, now this is what the Lord has had me praying over today. He said, 'Remember the moon.' I said, 'Watch the moon around the 10th.' This is a significant timeframe in the spirit realm during the full moon. Watch the moon. What is that? Yep. Great shaking. Great shaking. I see it. Then I saw a full moon and I saw the moon, and it was over New York, and it was coming up, and I could see a full moon in the sky, and I said, 'Watch the moon,' and I thought, 'What was that about?' How many times I've talked about that over the last couple of videos, even on the livestream I did. But I saw the 10th and it was highlighted to me. This is a time of decision-making, and I saw shaking. I saw planning and plotting with war and all this escalation of things. And you know, I had no idea that Bibi Benjamin Netanyahu was going to come the 7th, 8th, and 9th. He left last night. Sister Billy Brim, she texted me and she said, 'I got tickets to go and eat dinner with him out of 50-some people,' right? And she's a prayer warrior. I'm talking—you talk about a prayer warrior—Billy Brim is one of the greatest prayer warriors of this generation, ever. Just having her there praying is symbolic, I'm telling you, prophetically. So, we're seeing it. It's the timeframe of the full moon. Yes, it didn't happen on the full moon, which is on the 10th, but it was the 7th, 8th, and 9th. And the Lord said, 'Watch this timeframe.' And I thought, 'Lord, oh, what a plan. Oh, what a planner.' Just like Sister Billy always says, we're right there, folks. Something major is happening this week. As the full moon, just like He told me, 'Watch this timeframe,' Benjamin Netanyahu comes. Boom, boom, boom. Three days he's here. Then we see all this about a peace accord. And the Lord's warning me about a peace accord. The Lord's warning me about escalation with Russia, and He shows me all these things of Cuba. And you know, you just watch these videos of the things that I've gotten out of prayer and what He keeps warning us over and over and over. Timeframes to pray: September, from Rosh Hashanah to Rosh Hashanah, an acceleration of things. So, I just want you to know, you know, yeah, it's not the 10th, but it's the week. Look at what happened significantly this week in the White House. A foundation is being laid for a peace accord, for a covenant of many. I believe that's what we're about to see: peace agreements and negotiations of building the Third Temple. Trump and him are bouncing ideas. They're coming up with things. And He says, 'Some of these things I do not agree with, and they're an open door for destruction, and some of this will happen.' There was like the Lord was telling me pray about these, that they're making decisions. They're not set in stone yet. These decisions are—I want to say this—these decisions are not set in stone yet. The framework of the decision is being made as we speak. The foundation of the decisions is coming to the table right now is what the Lord was showing me. And He said, 'Because of these decisions, they're make-or-break things.' When I told you if they split Jerusalem, He said He would split America down the New Madrid. I saw the Mississippi River being completely decimated. We're seeing the birthing pains. And He said, 'Remember what I told you last Rosh Hashanah? Remember what I told you about Adam's lease? I show you what's coming in the future. We don't see any kind of change as we're seeing right now.' Last Rosh Hashanah He said things would accelerate, but Adam's lease, He said, is coming up. And as I was praying into September, He said, 'I circled September for a reason to you,' and there was a fog over it. There's change coming—great change, great financial change is coming. And He warned me to pray into the 21st of September again. Praying about the 21st of September, praying about the fall, praying about the fourth quarter, praying about acceleration of war, praying about this peace agreement, the covenant of many with the Arab nations. I saw the Arab nations coming alongside saying, 'Hey, we agree to a peace agreement, a peace accord with Israel. A Third Temple can be built, but you have to give so much land. You have to give this stuff.' And I'm telling you, I was praying into this. And the Lord told me, He said, 'An acceleration's coming.' But Adam's lease is coming up. It's about to be up. Do you understand, ladies and gentlemen? What I thought was last, when I'm looking in the spirit, it looks like it's right in front of your face. But the Lord told me, He said, 'Brandon, when you're looking in the spirit there, there's no time,' is what I'm trying to tell you. When you're hearing and you're seeing, you're going, 'Oh, it's right now.' But he showed me Adam's lease coming up. And he showed me all spiritual boundaries were changing in the spirit realm. It was a totally different alignment than what we see right now. And he said, "I told you all you needed was a sliver of time." I saw Satan slithering on his belly trying to create, saying, "Hey, it's my time to rule for the seven-year tribulation. It's my time. You've got to give—Adam's lease is up and you've got to give me my rights now." Right? And I saw him slithering trying to create the beast system, the Antichrist agenda, all the things that we know are coming. He was trying to accelerate it. But the Lord said, "I'm giving you a window. I'm giving you a little sliver of time. All you need is seconds in the spirit realm for a great revival, Brandon. For this will be a window for a great revival. And all you need is this much time in the spirit." It was just like seconds. And in those seconds, he said, "Watch what I will do for the greatest harvest you've ever seen." I saw angelic host—like what you see with Daniel when he had to pray and the prince of Persia was coming against him. I saw angelic hosts without any kind of demonic disturbance. Like they were just—I don't know how else to describe it to you—things that he was bringing up to me even tonight. He said, "Brandon, you will have to resist healing. It would be that easy to tap into it." What has taken a lot of cultivation of praying over to get the manifestation for some folks, it will be like picking ripe cherries off a tree. It will be like going out in an orchard and picking fruit because it's just low-hanging fruit. Low-hanging fruit, when there's so much pressure and there's been so much resistance sometimes believing for certain things. He said it would be low-hanging fruit, like it was with the children of Israel. They all left healed and whole and well. They left with their sandals not wearing out or their clothes wearing out. Everything they had was in abundant supply. But they left with the goods and the silver and the gold. They left with everything. They had an abundant supply. And the Lord was bringing up to me, he said, "Brandon, I'm going to do it again—an abundant supply over my children that are with me, that will just say yes." I'm telling you, we're about to see things. You know, I know a lot of the elderly generation, they've seen a lot. But we're about to see things we've never seen before. And it's going to be a shock and awe to a lot of people because they're the pioneers. They till the soil. They've got the soil ready. And a lot of them were weary in well-doing that it's a lot of work. But the Lord showed me what's about to happen will be effortless, sweatless victories. I want you to hear me: sweatless victories where you sweat by toil and you're having to work the ground, you have to work really hard to get it. It will be sweatless victories what's about to take place, ladies and gentlemen, across this earth. Sweatless victories where you're just going, "This is so easy. It's just like hitting an oil well and it's on the very top surface, and you could like, you know, Jed Clampett with the Beverly Hillbillies." You know, he's out there and he shoots the rabbit and the oil just starts coming up. That's the way it's going to be. You're not going to have to—"Well, it was just by accident." No, it was just by the grace of God. Do you understand? You're out there shooting the Holy Ghost rabbit, and you hit a gusher in the Holy Ghost, and you're going, "Well, that didn't take nothing." Sweatless victories, but it's not just a little bit of oil. It's God's Holy Ghost and fire. And I'm telling you, it'll be bigger than what you've ever dreamed, hoped, imagined, or thought. It's time to believe Him for big. He said, "My Adam's lease is coming up. I warned you about this over a year ago." He said, "And I had forgotten about it." And he told me all the things. He showed me the timeline. I call it the timeline. You can go back and watch it. He showed me where we are and all the generations before. And he said, "You're living in a time—you're the closers, and you're living in the time that people believed for generations. They believed to be where you are right now, and they weren't. But you're here. You're seeing the last of the last. As you watch what's happening in the White House, as I speak to you, as I was driving around, as you watch what's happening in the days ahead, what happened with the meetings, the foundation is being laid for an end-time event." And I go, "My goodness, Lord, where we are right now, no generation has ever seen before." And so you have a lot of people that say, "Well, this is the way we've always done it. This is the way we've done church. This is the way we've had church, and this is the way it's always going to be." And the Lord told me, he said, "A lot of them will be removed because they're blocking the flow of what I'm about to do. And you'll see that older generation in the days ahead that will come on home with me. They finished their race. And I'm raising up new ones that have no premeditated thoughts about what it's supposed to look like, how we're supposed to do it, or whatever. They're just green like me." And he said, "I will do with you what I've not done with anybody else because you're green." I don't have any either. I have not had anybody come along and try to mentor me. And the people that do, they seem to be like, "Yeah, okay. I'll talk to you a little bit." That's why he said, "Brandon, I've called you to walk alone. Just say what I've told you to say, and if you mess up, it's okay. My grace is sufficient for you." And many people will try to poo-poo you: "You're not qualified. You're not ready." And that's what's happened most of my whole life. But he said, "Don't pay attention to them. Just keep rising up and excelling. Just keep doing what I've called you to do by keeping your eyes on me. Don't worry about what those church people try to do around you. Don't worry about what they say. Honor the elders. Honor the people. And keep marching, soldier. Know that I've called you for such a time as this." And that's what I keep doing, folks. And that's what he keeps doing with me. But I'm telling you, an acceleration is here. It's time for you to rise up out of the den of slumber, out of your slumber, out of your sleep, and know that Jesus Christ is coming and that He's coming back for a glorious church. He said, "You're going to start to see people walk in deliverance ministries like you've never seen before." And some folks can get carried away and be flaky with it, but God will use a couple of flaky people and some fanatics versus some people that are dried up and religious like Pharisees. He'll correct it along the way. But I'm trying to tell you, there's going to be great deliverances in the days ahead, without spot or wrinkle. He's coming back for a church without spot or wrinkle. And there's a lot of people with demonic oppression that are walking around with bondage. And the Lord told me, he said, "I've come to set the captives free, Brandon. And you're going to see people walk in deliverance ministry like you've never seen before, setting the captives free." The spot and the wrinkle. What is the spot? The spot is demonic oppression. The wrinkle is hidden sin. I'm coming back for a church without hidden sin that doesn't have compromise, walking in the world and trying to walk with me, or with demonic oppression, walking around and going, "I'm in bondage to this. I've got an addiction to this." That is a spot. And He's cleaning up the spots, and He's ironing out the wrinkles. And you'll see great ministries rise up in the days ahead that have major deliverance ministries, a major outpouring of the Spirit of God like we've never seen before—healings, demonstrations, and manifestations. I know I say that a lot, but I'm trying to paint a picture to you of what's about to happen. You say, "Well, Brandon, I've heard that my whole life. I'm old now, and, you know, I'm really, quite frankly, tired of hearing it." I'm trying to tell you, sister; I'm trying to tell you, brother, that we are there. And then I heard from Paul Begley on his channel that they sacrificed and burnt the red heifer and that they're getting ready. They'll have the ashes prepared and all the things getting ready for the Third Temple. Folks, do you see the signs of the times, watching the fig tree? Jesus is coming, and they're getting ready to have the peace agreement to build the Third Temple. I told Diana, "That should tell you right there, if Adam's lease is coming up and the things I've said." I know there's a lot of people that believe we're here for the whole tribulation. There's a lot of people that believe we're here just until the first three and a half years—not for the great tribulation, but for the first three and a half years. And then there's a lot of people that believe like I believe: that we're not here for any of the tribulation. But I'm not dogmatic to always tell you, "I'm right." If we start to see the Antichrist come on the scene, then we've missed it. And if he comes out and starts doing things, like the peace agreement and all that, and we're here for some of that and we see it, then we know that the people who are mid-tribbers—I'll just go with their boat, because I don't believe we're here for the full thing. But I'm just telling you all, I believe in my heart, and still stand by it, that we're not here for any of the tribulation at all. But look at what's happening. So we should be seeing a revival and a rapture of the church really soon. And if this is where we are, the red heifer just got sacrificed. It hadn't been done in over 2,000 years or whatever—that's a long time, thousands of years. It hasn't happened, and we just did it, supposedly yesterday, while Benjamin is here talking about a peace agreement over Gaza and all that stuff. I thought, "This is no coincidence." The war, the hook in the jaw, Gog and Magog, and all these things are all coming about soon. We're just looking at all of it and going, "My goodness, folks. Are you watching? Are you seeing the signs of the times? It's really time to look at things. Look around us. What kind of a peace agreement are we about to see? What kind of a major agreement with the Abraham Accords are we about to see?" Supposedly, there are 250 tremors on Mount Rainier in Washington, which is a major volcano that went off before. There's all kinds of volcanic activity starting to pop up all on the western side, all where I'm telling you: British Columbia, all the way down through Seattle, and Oregon. There are volcanoes that are starting to shake, and I told you about one in the ocean. I'm telling you, folks, a major volcano is about to go off. I've seen it. I've seen Mount Fuji completely blow its top and level out, and I'm telling you, a lot of people will go home that day. I've seen a major one going off in Italy, and 300,000 people go home that day. What is causing all this disturbance to the Earth's surface? What is causing things to start to act this way? I'm telling you, it's a binary system. I've warned you about a major binary system that even Pastor Paul Begley was talking about, that NASA has confirmed. It's going to be on October 31st of this year; it passes in between us and Mars on October 31st of this year, folks. That's what's causing it. Something huge is coming, and it's causing our poles and our Earth to shift and do things differently with the sun, because it's coming in between us. What is this massive system that they're talking about on NASA's website? I don't know. Most people probably think, "Oh, it's no big deal because it's not going to affect us." It will affect us. I believe it will. I believe there are other things—stragglers coming behind it. It may not be the main thing, but there are little friends that might show up, like little rocks that follow it. I just feel there's something major because the Lord keeps bringing it up to me: "Brandon, you're about to see fearful sights that will bring them to their knees—a major shaking in the heavens." And I just keep adding it all up: Israel, volcanoes, major weird weather phenomena going on with all this rain. Boom, boom, boom, boom! Folks, do you not see where we are? All we need is a major revival. We need a major revival with a lot of people getting born again. I still believe a great shaking to awaken is happening. But what if this three-and-a-half-years—this little window of opportunity going into the next seven years at the end of the Shemitah cycles, the ten-year window of the decade before that, and then after that ten years is over, all of it together—would be the beginning of the thousand-year reign? What if we're that close to a decade window before we see something major—a new thousand-year reign with Jesus Christ? All these things coming about so quickly. Some people go, "Oh, I don't believe it's going to happen that quickly." What if it does? Are you ready for it? Are you prepared for what's coming? I just know that he said, "I'm standing at the door." How long do you think he can stand at the door in the spirit realm? I don't know. Then Trump's media thing says, "Hey, he wants to buy an ETF for these major cryptocurrencies." And I'm like, "What is that going to do? That's amazing." They applied for some kind of ETF for these major cryptocurrencies. I said, "Watch the summer months. Watch the BBB. Watch all these things that are happening for a wealth transfer to start to begin, for an acceleration of a double, a triple, and a quadruple of certain cryptocurrencies." They're going to go overnight—boom, boom, boom, boom! And he said, "I'll make decamillionaires overnight." And you say, "Well, how's that going to happen? I'm just working on Social Security." I don't know. You need to ask the Holy Spirit for yourself. Ask the Holy Spirit what you should be doing, because he said you'll lack no good thing. Those that love him will lack no good thing, those that are worshiping him, those that are looking and honoring him with their tithing and their offerings—you'll lack no good thing. God has made a way in the wilderness. He can provide the manna and the fish and the loaves. Oh, look what he can provide—all that you need. Look at all that he's done in the Bible. And he's no respecter of persons. And if he multiplies the widow's oil and pays the debt off and does all the things that he's done—the gold in the fish to pay the taxes, Peter's nets full, breaking the boat—I mean, my goodness, folks. God is a God of an abundant supply. And I'm telling you, we are at the door of something amazing because every single time I'm praying over it, I can sense it. Does anybody else—say in the comments down below—do you sense it? Do you sense something major is about to happen? He's talking about a major revival in Asia, a major revival in America and around the world. Do you sense it? I'm always curious about where people are at because, you know, I don't talk to a lot of folks. I feel like I'm on the backside of the desert with Diana and the children, and we talk to folks every once in a while at church, but we really live a private life. We don't have a lot of people that we talk to. And even the ones you talk to, they don't act like they get it. They just kind of go, 'Okay, all right. Put that away, tuck that away a little bit. That's a little out there, okay?' But you just keep marching. You don't worry about what everybody else says. You just know that God's speaking to you. And if they get it, they get it; if they don't, they don't. You're not here to try to sway or convince anybody. He that has ears to hear what the Spirit is saying, let them hear. That's what I'm learning. Other than that, I give the word of what the Lord has for you. I say what he said. You don't need fluff. There's a lot of prophetic fluff. There's a lot of people that, after they say something to you, you don't have a clue what they said. So then they come back and say, 'Prophetic confirmation. I told you it was going to come.' But you go, 'Well, you said earthquakes were coming, brother. Well, there's earthquakes every single year.' Or, 'Well, there are storms coming, brother. There are storms every single year.' Be bolder and more declarative about the words God gives you to give. Don't be afraid of the persecution you get from it. That's what the Lord's showing me. Paint the picture and make it plain. Say what I say, say it with boldness, do it with accuracy, and be who I've called you to be. Don't go, 'Well, I'm going to paint this huge thing and say all these words,' and then you go, 'What was that?' There's no confusion with Him. It's black and white. Does that make sense? There's no gray. God doesn't have words of confusion where you walk away going, 'I don't remember what that prophetic word was.' There's no question. And I want you never to walk away and say, 'Brandon, I have questions about what you said.' No, I told you what was coming. And if it's off, it's off, and you can throw eggs or whatever if it's off. But at least I told you what I heard, and you don't have to question or scratch your head. You go, 'Well, that was pretty black and white. Storms and manipulation of weather all over the place. Weather warfare. It's obvious. There it is. It's happening. That's black and white.' Major rains, major drought, major winds are coming beyond any comprehension, winds that you've never seen before. Earthquakes in diverse places. Volcanoes going off. Boom. Boom. The volcanoes are popping. And people go, 'Brandon, there's another volcano.' Yes. He said there will be more volcanoes than you've ever seen. There will be big ones—big ones that disrupt flights. Watch Italy. Watch these places. And the Lord's trying to warn you all. Watch what's coming in the sky. That's another thing. Watch what's coming. Fearful sights you will see in the days ahead that will bring you to your knees. Men's hearts will fail them for fear, looking after those things that are coming on the earth, for the powers of heaven will be shaken. And he told me, he said, 'Brandon, these are the beginning of sorrows.' Many people will be freaked out about what they're seeing, and it's going to scare folks. If you're not staying vertical and you're going horizontal, it's going to scare you what's coming. And then I warn you about the planes and the hackers and the things the Lord tells us, folks. It's all to the glory of God because he doesn't want any of us caught off guard for what's coming next. He wants you to know ahead of time. And the only time I'm able to tell you what's coming is by what I get in prayer. And when I come before you and we pray as a family, I tell you these are things we can avoid and these are things we cannot. There are certain things that we can, and the Lord said that's why he said pray on the 4th of July. Stop these men that are trying to rise up. They're being cowards right now, which is good. The fear of God is inside of them. And he said they're trying to get them to be lone wolf attackers. And we prayed and nothing happened. Just like he said, 'Pray for an hour. Just give me an hour, Brandon, with the people that are on your channel. Give me an hour.' And we did it, folks. And we didn't see anyone rise up and do anything. And he says, 'Pray over this.' Now, I'm hearing about Bibi and what's going on in Israel with the White House. And he said, 'Pray over this. This is a major deal. Big decisions are being made right now—a framework of a peace agreement, a covenant of many, all being designed and all coming together right now, right in front of your face.' And many people don't know what's happening in these meetings in the White House as the full moon is here. I know I keep rehearsing this, but I try to say it over because I say so much and I don't want you to be left out of anything. I want you to hear it because he's wanting you to be prepared. So, you know, that's why I try to tell everybody: just because you have somebody come alongside you and help you out of a ditch doesn't mean they're always in your life forever. I want you to really focus on Jesus in the days ahead, not looking like... the Lord told me, he said, 'Brandon, you don't need people to help you out for what I've called you to. Nobody in this generation has walked where I'm telling you to walk on YouTube.' How many YouTubers do you have coming on and praying, doing this? How can you have an elder tell you how to do it when they've never done it before? We're doing online stuff. This is totally different. Do you understand? Healing through the internet, doing these things through the internet. There are not very many YouTube channels that are praying and doing this, right? Leading a million-prayer army. We're just doing it because this is the new thing. Now, before, you had Brother Hagin; they would have to send out flyers and tell everybody what's coming in the town ahead. And they would do that and they'd have tent meetings. Right now, we just come online. I say, 'Hey, we're going to go live,' and look how the Lord has made it so easy for all of us to get together from all around the world. We don't even have to get on a plane to be a part of the meeting. You just click on there and say, 'Let's pray.' Isn't that wonderful?
